StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT SchemaID, SchemaName, ObjectID, ObjectName, ObjectType, IsMemoryOptimized, IndexID, IndexName, IndexType, AllowPageLocks, IsImageText, IsNewLOB, IsFileStream, IsColumnStore, IsComputed, IsTimestamp, OnReadOnlyFileGroup, ResumableIndexOperation, StatisticsID, StatisticsName, NoRecompute, IsIncremental, PartitionID, PartitionNumber, PartitionCount, [Order], Selected, Completed FROM (SELECT schemas.[schema_id] AS SchemaID, schemas.[name] AS SchemaName, objects.[object_id] AS ObjectID, objects.[name] AS ObjectName, RTRIM(objects.[type]) AS ObjectType, tables.is_memory_optimized AS IsMemoryOptimized, indexes.index_id AS IndexID, indexes.[name] AS IndexName, indexes.[type] AS IndexType, indexes.allow_page_locks AS AllowPageLocks, CASE WHEN indexes.[type] = 1 AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM sys.columns columns INNER JOIN sys.types types ON columns.system_type_id = types.user_type_id WHERE columns.[object_id] = objects.object_id AND types.name IN('image','text','ntext')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsImageText, CASE WHEN indexes.[type] = 1 AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM sys.columns columns INNER JOIN sys.types types ON columns.system_type_id = types.user_type_id OR (columns.user_type_id = types.user_type_id AND types.is_assembly_type = 1) WHERE columns.[object_id] = objects.object_id AND (types.name IN('xml') OR (types.name IN('varchar','nvarchar','varbinary') AND columns.max_length = -1) OR (types.is_assembly_type = 1 AND columns.max_length = -1))) THEN 1 WHEN indexes.[type] = 2 AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM sys.index_columns index_columns INNER JOIN sys.columns columns ON index_columns.[object_id] = columns.[object_id] AND index_columns.column_id = columns.column_id INNER JOIN sys.types types ON columns.system_type_id = types.user_type_id OR (columns.user_type_id = types.user_type_id AND types.is_assembly_type = 1) WHERE index_columns.[object_id] = objects.object_id AND index_columns.index_id = indexes.index_id AND (types.[name] IN('xml') OR (types.[name] IN('varchar','nvarchar','varbinary') AND columns.max_length = -1) OR (types.is_assembly_type = 1 AND columns.max_length = -1))) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsNewLOB, CASE WHEN indexes.[type] = 1 AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM sys.columns columns WHERE columns.[object_id] = objects.object_id AND columns.is_filestream = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsFileStream, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT * FROM sys.indexes indexes WHERE indexes.[object_id] = objects.object_id AND [type] IN(5,6)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsColumnStore, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT * FROM sys.index_columns index_columns INNER JOIN sys.columns columns ON index_columns.object_id = columns.object_id AND index_columns.column_id = columns.column_id WHERE (index_columns.key_ordinal > 0 OR index_columns.partition_ordinal > 0) AND columns.is_computed = 1 AND index_columns.object_id = indexes.object_id AND index_columns.index_id = indexes.index_id) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsComputed, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT * FROM sys.index_columns index_columns INNER JOIN sys.columns columns ON index_columns.[object_id] = columns.[object_id] AND index_columns.column_id = columns.column_id INNER JOIN sys.types types ON columns.system_type_id = types.system_type_id WHERE index_columns.[object_id] = objects.object_id AND index_columns.index_id = indexes.index_id AND types.[name] = 'timestamp') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsTimestamp, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes indexes2 INNER JOIN sys.destination_data_spaces destination_data_spaces ON indexes.data_space_id = destination_data_spaces.partition_scheme_id INNER JOIN sys.filegroups filegroups ON destination_data_spaces.data_space_id = filegroups.data_space_id WHERE filegroups.is_read_only = 1 AND indexes2.[object_id] = indexes.[object_id] AND indexes2.[index_id] = indexes.index_id AND destination_data_spaces.destination_id = partitions.partition_number) THEN 1 WHEN EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes indexes2 INNER JOIN sys.filegroups filegroups ON indexes.data_space_id = filegroups.data_space_id WHERE filegroups.is_read_only = 1 AND indexes

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [Expr1959]<>(0) THEN (0) ELSE CONVERT(bit,(1)-([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1024))/(1024),0) END
CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(1) AND [Expr1948] THEN (1) ELSE (0) END

CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(1) AND [Expr1949] THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(2) AND [Expr1950] THEN (1) ELSE (0) END END
CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(1) AND [Expr1951] THEN (1) ELSE (0) END
CASE WHEN [Expr1955] THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1956] THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(1) AND [Expr1957] THEN (1) ELSE (0) END END END
rtrim(CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0))

([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))<>(0) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(67108864))=(0) AND CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(128),0)=(0) AND CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(256),0)=(0) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(1) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(2) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(4) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(5) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(6) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(7))

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[nsclass] as [o].[nsclass]=(0) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pclass] as [o].[pclass]=(1) AND CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[status] as [o].[status]&(1),0)=(0) AND (CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='V' OR CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='U')

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[nsclass] as [o].[nsclass]=(0) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pclass] as [o].[pclass]=(1) AND CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='U'

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[id] as [i].[id]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysrowsets].[idmajor] as [rs].[idmajor] AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[indid] as [i].[indid]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysrowsets].[idminor] as [rs].[idminor] AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysrowsets].[ownertype] as [rs].[ownertype]=(1) AND CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysrowsets].[status] as [rs].[status]&(65536),0)=(0)

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[id] as [i].[id]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysrowsets].[idmajor] as [rs].[idmajor] AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[indid] as [i].[indid]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysrowsets].[idminor] as [rs].[idminor] AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysrowsets].[ownertype] as [rs].[ownertype]=(1) AND CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysrowsets].[status] as [rs].[status]&(65536),0)=(1)

([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syscolpars].[xtype] as [c].[xtype]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[id] as [t].[id] OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syscolpars].[utype] as [c].[utype]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[id] as [t].[id] AND [Expr1973]=(1)) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[name] as [t].[name]=N'xml' OR ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[name] as [t].[name]=N'nvarchar' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[name] as [t].[name]=N'varbinary' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[name] as [t].[name]=N'varchar') AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syscolpars].[length] as [c].[length]=(-1) OR [Expr1973]=(1) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syscolpars].[length] as [c].[length]=(-1))
CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[xtype] as [t].[xtype]=(240) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0)

([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syscolpars].[xtype] as [c].[xtype]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[id] as [t].[id] OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syscolpars].[utype] as [c].[utype]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[id] as [t].[id] AND [Expr1974]=(1)) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[name] as [t].[name]=N'xml' OR ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[name] as [t].[name]=N'nvarchar' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[name] as [t].[name]=N'varbinary' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[name] as [t].[name]=N'varchar') AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syscolpars].[length] as [c].[length]=(-1) OR [Expr1974]=(1) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syscolpars].[length] as [c].[length]=(-1))
CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[xtype] as [t].[xtype]=(240) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0)

([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(67108864))=(0) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(5) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(6)) AND (([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))<(0) OR ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))>(0))

([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysiscols].[tinyprop1] as [isc].[tinyprop1]>(0) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysiscols].[tinyprop2] as [isc].[tinyprop2]>(0)) AND (([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysiscols].[status] as [isc].[status]&(2))<(0) OR ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysiscols].[status] as [isc].[status]&(2))>(0))

CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysobjvalues].[value] as [sov4].[value] IS NULL THEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syscolpars].[status] as [c].[status]&(16)|CONVERT_IMPLICIT(int,isnull(CONVERT(tinyint,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysobjvalues].[value] as [sov7].[value],0),(0))&(2),0) ELSE (0) END,0)=(1)

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FL' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FG' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FD' OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>12 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>5 AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FX'

CASE WHEN ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[status2] as [obj].[status2]&(8))<>(0) THEN (0) ELSE isnull([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syssingleobjrefs].[indepid] as [ds].[indepid],(1)-([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(256))/(256)) END

CASE WHEN ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[status2] as [obj].[status2]&(8))<>(0) THEN (0) ELSE isnull([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syssingleobjrefs].[indepid] as [ds].[indepid],(1)-([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(256))/(256)) END

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FL' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FG' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FD' OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>12 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>5 AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FX'

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[nsclass] as [o].[nsclass]=(0) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pclass] as [o].[pclass]=(1) AND CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='U'

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FL' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FG' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FD' OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>12 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>5 AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FX'

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[indid] as [i].[indid]<>(254) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[indid] as [i].[indid]<>(896254) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))=(1) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(67108864))=(67108864)

INDEX_RESUMABLE_OPERATIONS.[object_id]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[id] as [i].[id] AND INDEX_RESUMABLE_OPERATIONS.[index_id]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[indid] as [i].[indid] AND (INDEX_RESUMABLE_OPERATIONS.[partition_number]=[Union1302] OR INDEX_RESUMABLE_OPERATIONS.[partition_number] IS NULL)
